title: IMUSA USA Small Wood Mortar & Pestle
description:
About this item
COMPACT AND ADAPTABLE: Measuring 3.5 inches in diameter, this mortar and pestle offers the perfect size for various food preparations, with a comfortable pestle included for easy operation
DURABLE AND CLASSIC STYLE: Crafted from natural polished wood, it combines beauty and functionality with a classic look that adds a touch of elegance to your kitchen
USER-FRIENDLY DESIGN: Featuring a comfortable pestle and a curved base for effortless operation, this versatile tool is perfect for grinding, mashing, and mixing, making it a valuable addition to your kitchen
DIVERSE OPTIONS: Used for creating salsas, curries, marinades, and grinding spices, herbs, garlic, and ginger, this mortar and pestle set helps enhance the flavor and texture of your culinary creations
COOKING ESSENTIAL: Ideal for crushing, grinding, mashing, and making marinades, this set offers a practical tool for a wide range of cooking tasks
reviews_5s:
Nice and solid wood. Beautiful finish. Small size is perfect for herbs and spices. Smooth surface cleans easily. I love this product.Very good. well made
.Love the small upright size of this item. It takes up very little room. Also, the wooden grains are very pretty. It could be left out on the counter.muy buen producto y excelente precio lo recomiendo al 100 por cientoIt arrived undamaged. It's not the first wood dish I have ever owned so I know only wash with lukewarm water. Never let it sit in water or put in the dishwasher. If not for decor. you should oil i it Or. Even Organic bees wax and oil. I used vegetable oil It will work great for me.It's compact, good looking and works well.Me encanto el tamano y la calidad, Recomendado 100%Play Video
I was looking for an inexpensive potion prop and this worked great!BuenoLove it
reviews_1s:
Waist of my money 😞😞🥺😟Too smallAs many before me have said, the wood is unfinished and has splinters, but the bigger issue is that the whole item is filled with wood filter and white powder. Last I checked wood filler is not food safe. It’s all over the outside and inside of the cup. Completely unacceptable.It was unsanded on the inside and had very long splinters. I was not going to use this to grind medication for my animals. Got refunded.got refunded.The wood is rough and splintered. I bought this to grind flaxseed for my almost 1 year old. Unfortunately I missed the return window by three days. I just opened it today and there is no way I could use it or would use it. I would literally be mixing splinters in her food.Was so disappointed when i received this parcel because it was way to small than what i saw in the picture and what i was expecting.Please if you are looking for kitchen decoration, you can get this.For me this is absolutely a toll mortar that can only be use for decoration.I wish i knew what to do with mind rather than putting it in the trash.In fact it's just a size of a small glass. What can i do with this??????????/////The inside is not sanded at all
Can’t use for species, chucks of wood will come of and screw your herbsThis came with a crack in the wood that was filled with a "mystery paste." I'm not comfortable with my food contacting it. I'm setting it aside in case I ever need it for an art project or something like that. It's just not worth returning.I expected this thing to be small, based off the description, but I didn’t expect it to be this small. I mean the thing is tiny. Extremely small. I can’t do anything with it. It’s like a child’s toy. At this point, it just decoration. Can’t say I’m not disappointed.Super cheap not even sanded!! I’m very upset with this product I was so exited ☹️ Pieces of wood are going to get in my food!!! Do better amazon..
